title: Baked Cod with Norwegian Fjord Vegetables
description: A flavorful and healthy dish featuring fresh cod, Norwegian fjord vegetables, and a hint of doraji. Perfect for a light and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: fresh norwegian fjord vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as kale, carrots, and beets

instructions: Rinse the cod fillet and pat it dry with a paper towel.
Season the cod with salt and pepper.
In a baking dish, arrange the Norwegian fjord vegetables in a single layer.
Place the cod fillet on top of the vegetables.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with doraji flowers (if using).
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the cod is cooked through.
